highlights.summary: The AP ICET 2026 application portal is live for the The Hindu College admission to the MBA/PGDM course. Students can register till Mar 26, 2026 (with a late fee of INR 1000) for the exam scheduled for May 2, 2026.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 525 students were admitted at The Hindu College and 430 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 430 students 23 were placed with median salary of INR 300000 and 240 students opted for higher studies. A total of 743 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at The Hindu Collegeand 570 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 570 students 44 were placed with median salary of INR 350000 and 321 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 78 students were admitted at The Hindu College and 70 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 70 students 30 were placed with median salary of INR 325000 and 3 students opted for higher studies. A total of 160 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at The Hindu Collegeand 145 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 145 students 84 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 15 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, The Hindu College offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. College offers B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Sc., MCA and M.Voc. The Hindu College course fee ranges between INR 13,290 to 1,20,000.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good, but they should improve their teaching skills.

content.Placements: In Computer Science and Engineering, 50 to 60% of students were placed. The highest package went up to 80 LPA, offered by Atlassian, while the average package was nearly 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Atlassian, Infosys, Jio, TCS, etc. Around 30 to 40% of students took internships in various multinational companies. The top roles offered were web developer, app developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel facility in the college, but m outside the college there were many private hostels. The college infrastructure was good, and classrooms were neat, clean, and well-ventilated. All academic books were available in the library. Wi-Fi facility labs were also present, along with smart classrooms to guide and teach students in a digital way. There was a canteen inside the campus, which was quite good and maintained hygiene while cooking food. Various types of sports, as well as indoor and outdoor games, were played in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Jabalpur.

content.Placements: Almost 75-80% of students got placed in this course. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Mastech, Wipro, Jio, etc. The average salary package offered ranges between 3.5 LPA - 7 LPA. The highest salary package offered was 35 LPA. Around 60-70% of students got internships at Cisco, AICTE, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are available for all branches like civil, computer science, mechanical, etc. Canteen is very good. It also has a basketball court. Playground is available for sports like cricket.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: No.1 college in Jabalpur. No.1 college in mahakaushal.

content.Placements: 70 to 60 percent placement is offered. The highest package is 35 lakh. TCS, Infosys and a lot more companies came for placement. We are using a lot of artificial intelligence devices like Google Alexa siri than think about that what will be the role of artificial intelligence in future that's why I chose this course.
content.Infrastructure: College is very good. In college we have very good and clean classes, in my class we also have AC. Teachers are helpful, for all subjects we have best teachers in the college. There is canteen and sports is also available in the college like volleyball, cricket and basketball.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Jabalpur for engineering.

content.Placements: In this college (Shri ram group of institutions) most of the students were placed were from my stream of Computer Science engineering. The highest package from the college (Shri ram group of institutions) is 22 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA. And according to the college (Shri ram group of institutions) average package of students is 6 Lacs per annum in computer Science engineering. There are too many companies visiting our college (Shri ram group of institutions). Some top companies are TCS, Wipro, Paytm, Reliance Jio etc. Most of the students got internships something about 70 to 80 %. Some students also got internships in multiple nation companies like Microsoft. In my course, the top offers are in the field of software Engineer and software development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college. It is the best college if you just want a degree.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. The highest and the lowest salary package is not offered to the students. Prism Cement company visit our college for placements. It does not provide internship opportunities. Overall, it does not provide placement opportunities in the civil engineering branch.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facility as the college is in the city. There are so many PGs and hostels nearby. It provides facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students.
content.Faculty: Only HODs and some teachers are qualified in our college. Their teaching quality is average. They do not make students industry-ready. Semester exams are not so hard. The pass percentage is 95%. Students easily pass their semester exams as our college is affiliated with RGPV.
